name: run_deseq2_analysis
description: Run R DESeq2 differential expression analysis on a count matrix + metadata. Returns gene counts, significance stats, and dispersion estimates. Uses actual R DESeq2 (not pydeseq2) for maximum accuracy. Supports custom design formulas, contrasts, reference levels, LFC shrinkage, and refit_cooks.

operation.description: deseq2: differential expression, enrichgo: GO enrichment with clusterProfiler::simplify

counts_file.description: Path to CSV count matrix (genes x samples, first column = gene IDs)

metadata_file.description: Path to CSV metadata (samples x variables, must include design variables)

design.description: R formula string (e.g., '~ condition', '~ Replicate + Media + Strain')

lfc_threshold.description: Log2 fold change threshold for filtering (default: 0 = no filter)

gene_list_file.description: For enrichgo: path to file with one gene ID per line

background_file.description: For enrichgo: path to background gene list file

ontology.description: For enrichgo: GO ontology (BP, CC, MF). Default: BP

id_type.description: Gene ID type (ENSEMBL, ENTREZID, SYMBOL). Default: ENSEMBL

organism.description: Organism annotation DB (org.Hs.eg.db, org.Mm.eg.db). Default: org.Hs.eg.db
